title: EasyOres
description: Making Ores Easy to spot with an outline!
body:
# EasyOres :
**its job is to make ores easier to spot in minecraft by making it bright and clear! and I added an outline for it to make it more simple :D**
sub to my yt channel too :D (am tryna make more videos about this resource pack so sub until i get enough motivation!)
my yt channel is **[Here](https://www.youtube.com/@Vw_wYT)**
